entity.summary: Multichain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange and DeFi platform with current liquidity and low but non-zero recent spot trading activity across BNB Chain and Polygon.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Gravis Finance as a multichain AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass, so URL fields remain unset. HEI uses active status because current trading activity is non-zero despite low recent fee generation.

evidence.title: Gravis Finance project social profile
evidence.notes: Project social identity linked from the current protocol registry and used as identity corroboration rather than as the sole status source.

evidence.title: Gravis Finance metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Gravis Finance as a multichain AMM DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume across BNB Chain and Polygon, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Gravis Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Gravis Finance as a decentralized exchange and corroborates the multichain entity identity.
